content:
🚀 squirreldisk | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Identifying and visualizing large files and directories to free up disk space.
✨ Key Features: • Fast scan and deep directory scanning • Disk scanning or pick a directory • External disks real-time detection • Sunburst chart for disk usage visualization • Drag and drop for collecting items to delete
📖 Summary: SquirrelDisk is a cross-platform desktop application built with Rust and React (Tauri) for analyzing disk usage. It helps users quickly identify large files and folders consuming hard drive space, offering a visual representation of disk utilization through a sunburst chart.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
